narrative_log: You awaken in a room that smells of old paper, beeswax, and a faint, lingering trace of expensive perfume. Sunlight filters through a massive bay window, illuminating dust motes that dance in the quiet air. You have no memory of how you arrived here, only a vague sense of authority and a strange, magnetic pull toward the figure standing near the desk. This is your domain, and the girl watching you with wide, uncertain eyes seems to know it. Jade has just arrived in the manor library. The girl is present and docile. No interactions have occurred yet; the girl's state is neutral. The computer is ready for input.
blueprint: Starting Room: The Library. North: A locked heavy oak door (currently impassable). East: The bay window overlooking the garden. West: A wall of bookshelves. South: A wall of bookshelves. No other rooms are currently accessible.

player.description: You are Jade, a striking 21-year-old woman with skin the color of rich milk chocolate and a mane of kinky black hair that frames your face. You are dressed in a sheer silk blouse, a tight black pencil skirt, a lace bra, matching lace panties, and high-heeled pumps. Around your neck hangs a delicate gold chain with a small heart pendant.

room_start.name: The Manor Library
room_start.description:
You are in a lavish, wood-paneled library. Floor-to-ceiling bookshelves line the western and southern walls, packed with leather-bound volumes. To the east, a grand bay window offers a panoramic view of a perfectly manicured English garden, though the glass is thick and soundproof. A heavy oak door stands to the north, currently locked. The air is still, and the only sound is the faint hum of an old computer terminal resting on a massive mahogany desk.

You can see here: the girl, computer, mahogany desk.

The air is still, and the only sound is the faint hum of an old computer terminal resting on a massive mahogany desk.
